title: An Act to Promote Responsible, Cost-effective Energy in Maine by Amending the Tariff Rates Applicable to the Commercial and Institutional Net Energy Billing Program
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 20, 2025
last_house_action: 3/27/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/20/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
